_comment: Eval set for aviation-change-safety-assessment (06-06 hse-aviation). Intake-gate + must-identify-new-hazards + 5×5-via-shared-engine + HoC + the de-id CLEAN fixture case. The seeded deid-leak.md (auto-discovered by test_sector_deid_pairs) proves the de-id hard-fail.

evals.query: We're making a change — is it safe?
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to assess until the named operator and the specific change are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before assessing.
Refuses a vague 'we're changing things' — elicits the named operator and the specific change (specificity).
Asks for the new/changed hazards the change introduces.

evals.query: Assess the safety of adding a new hot-and-high destination to our network; new hazards include unstabilised approaches; mitigation proposed is a crew briefing card only.
evals.expected_behavior: Identifies the new hazards, scores them via the shared risk_matrix engine with the ICAO 5×5, HoC-ranks the mitigations flagging the briefing-card-only control, and records an approve/decline decision with a rationale.
expectations: Identifies the new/changed hazards the change introduces — does not approve a change with no new hazards considered.
Scores each new hazard via risk_matrix.score() with the ICAO 5×5 MatrixConfig (KB-DATA-AVI-RISK-MATRIX) — does not hand-roll a matrix.
HoC-ranks mitigations and flags the administrative-only briefing card; records an approve/decline decision with a rationale and named owners/dates (smart_actions).

evals.query: Assess this change from the submitted change request.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; any named individual in the change request is pseudonymised to a role label; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers are listed up front.
Named individuals and contact become role labels; no re-identification key is embedded.
No real name, contact, address or identity in the circulated assessment (de_identification hard-fail on any leak).
